label{font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif;font-size:13px}*{font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif!important;margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}body{background-color:#234;overflow-x:hidden}.custom-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}.custom-scroll{scrollbar-width:none;-ms-overflow-style:none}.games-panel{width:100vw;height:100vh;overflow-y:auto;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;background:#234;color:#01aefd;z-index:99999}.title-bar{width:90%;max-width:1200px;height:70px;margin:20px 0}50%{background-position:91% 16px;border-radius:10px;border:none;font-size:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;outline:0}.title-bar-search::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)}.title-bar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}.icon-button{background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border:none;border-radius:50%;width:44px;height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,transform .1s}.game-card,.modal-close{border:none;cursor:pointer}.icon-button:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3);transform:scale(1.05)}.icon-button svg{width:24px;height:24px;fill:white}.game-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:24px;padding:40px 60px 60px;max-width:1800px;margin:0 auto}.game-card{width:100%;height:160px;background:#1a1a1a;border-radius:15px;padding:0;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}.game-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(1,174,253,.3)}.game-card-image{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:15px}.game-card-label{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:100%;padding:10px top,rgba(0,0,0,.9),rgba(0,0,0,0));text-align:left}.modal-overlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100vw;height:100vh;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;z-index:100000}.game-back-bar,.modal-close{align-items:center;display:flex}.modal{background:rgba(17,17,17,.95);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:24px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px 24px;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,transform .1s}.tag-button:hover{background:linear-gradient(45deg,#00c5ff,#01aefd);transform:scale(1.05)}.tag-button.active{background:#015afd}.game-back-bar{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:9999;height:44px;background:rgba(15,15,20,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);gap:12px;padding:0 16px;font-family:Fredoka,sans-serif}.game-back-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid - .15s,opacity _buildBridgeScript(e,t,n){return`(function(){
 var BASE = ${JSON.stringify(e)};
 var SPOOF_HOST = ${JSON.stringify(t||"")};
 var SAVED_LS = ${JSON.stringify(n||{})};

 /* ── 1. Restore saved localStorage ── */
 try {
 for (var k in SAVED_LS) {
 if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(SAVED_LS, k))
 localStorage.setItem(k, SAVED_LS[k]);
 }
 } catch(e) {}

 /* ── 2. localStorage → parent mirror (with 60 s hard-cap debounce) ── */
 var _lastSent = '';
 function _snapshot() {
 try {
 var snap = {};
 for (var i = 0; i < localStorage.length; i++) {
 var k = localStorage.key(i);
 snap[k] = localStorage.getItem(k);
 }
 var str = JSON.stringify(snap);
 if (str !== _lastSent) {
 _lastSent = str;
 parent.postMessage({ type: 'zw_ls_save', data: snap }, '*');
 }
 } catch(e) {}
 }
 /* Poll every 5 s + flush on visibility hide + page unload */
 setInterval(_snapshot, 5000);
 document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function() {
 if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden') _snapshot();
 });
 window.addEventListener('pagehide', _snapshot);
 window.addEventListener('beforeunload', _snapshot);

 /* ── 3. Location spoof (via Window.prototype — works even when
 window.location is non-configurable on the instance) ── */
 if (SPOOF_HOST) {
 try {
 var _rl = location;
 var _fo = 'https://' + SPOOF_HOST;
 var _lp = new Proxy(_rl, {
 get: function(t, p) {
 if (p === 'hostname' || p === 'host') return SPOOF_HOST;
 if (p === 'origin') return _fo;
 if (p === 'protocol') return 'https:';
 if (p === 'href') return _fo + '/';
 var v = t[p]; return typeof v === 'function' ? v.bind(t) : v;
 }
 });
 Object.defineProperty(Window.prototype, 'location',
 { get: function(){ return _lp; }, configurable: true });
 try {
 Object.defineProperty(document, 'referrer',
 { get: function(){ return _fo + '/'; }, configurable: true });
 } catch(e) {}
 } catch(e) { console.warn('[ZW] location spoof failed:', e); }
 }

 /* ── 4. fetch — resolve relative URLs, swallow non-GitHub failures ── */
 var _oFetch = window.fetch;
 window.fetch = function(input, init) {
 var u = input;
 try {
 if (typeof input === 'string' && !/^(https?:|data:|blob:)/i.test(input)) {
 u = new URL(input, BASE).href;
 input = u;
 }
 } catch(e) {}
 var p = _oFetch.call(this, input, init);
 if (typeof u === 'string' && u.indexOf('raw.githubusercontent.com') === -1) {
 p = p.catch(function() {
 return new Response('{}', { status: 200,
 headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } });
 });
 }
 return p;
 };

 /* ── 5. XHR — resolve relative URLs ── */
 var _oXHR = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open;
 XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = function(method, url) {
 try {
 if (url && !/^(https?:|data:|blob:)/i.test(url))
 url = new URL(url, BASE).href;
 } catch(e) {}

 };

 /* ── 6. Worker — blobify cross-origin scripts + patch importScripts ── */
 var _oWorker = window.Worker;
 window.Worker = function(url, opts) {
 try {
 if (!/^(https?:|blob:)/i.test(url)) url = new URL(url, BASE).href;
 var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
 xhr.open('GET', url, false);
 xhr.send(null);
 if (xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status < 300) {
 var workerBase = url.substring(0, url.lastIndexOf('/') + 1) || BASE;
 var patch = '(function(){'
 + 'var __wb=' + JSON.stringify(workerBase) + ';'
 + 'var __ois=self.importScripts;'
 + 'self.importScripts=function(){'
 + ' var a=Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments).map(function(u){'
 + ' return /^(https?:|blob:|data:)/i.test(u)?u:new URL(u,__wb).href;'
 + ' });'
 + ' return __ois.apply(self,a);'
 + '};'
 + '})();
';
 return new _oWorker(
 URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([patch + xhr.responseText],
 { type: 'application/javascript' })), opts);
 }
 } catch(e) { console.warn('[ZW] Worker blobify failed:', e); }
 return new _oWorker(url, opts);
 };
